nasb.text: For then I will give to the peoples purified lips, That all of them may call on the name of the Lord, To serve Him shoulder to shoulder.

esv.text: “For at that time I will change the speech of the peoples to a pure speech, that all of them may call upon the name of the Lord and serve him with one accord.

cnv.text: 那時我要使萬民有潔淨的嘴唇， 他們全都可以呼求耶和華的名， 同心合意事奉耶和華。

ccb.text: “那时，我必洁净万民的口， 以便他们可以求告我的名， 同心合意地事奉我。
